name: spreadsheet-peek
description: Inline local spreadsheet viewer for Claude Desktop, powered by wolfxl.
long_description: Spreadsheet Peek adds read-only MCP tools and an interactive MCP App grid for local .xlsx, .xlsm, .xls, .xlsb, .ods, .csv, .tsv, and comma-delimited .txt files. It uses the installed wolfxl binary for parsing and keeps workbook contents local.

tools.name: preview_workbook
tools.description: Return a bounded structured preview of a local spreadsheet.

tools.name: open_workbook_viewer
tools.description: Open an interactive inline spreadsheet viewer with image and structured fallbacks.
